CONG TY VAT TU NOI BO
So: 01/SMOKE-PL

PHU LUC I
DANH MUC VAT TU CAN DOI CHIEU

1. May bom nuoc: 02 bo, can kiem tra serial va bien ban ban giao.
2. Ong dan ap luc: 15 met, can doi chieu kho va phieu xuat.
3. Van khoa chinh: 04 cai, can review do OCR co the nham ky hieu.

Ghi chu: Day la fixture smoke local cho review queue phu luc.
